calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-01-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Defendants Jae H. Lee And Ju Y. Lee To Answer Form Interrogatories, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Carol L. Healey, Esq. of Bishop Barry Drath, Tel. 510.596.0888, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The tentative ruling was uncontested and adopted as the ruling of the Court. DEFENDANTs JOHN KIM and JENY WEBER's Motion For Order Compelling Defendants Jae H. Lee And Ju Y. Lee To Answer Form Interrogatories, And For Monetary Sanctions is unopposed and granted. Plaintiff to serve verified responses no later than January 26, 2015. Request for sanctions is granted. Plaintiff is to pay $555.00 made payable to defendants and their attorney of record no later than January 26, 2015. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
